boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match despite urgent email tone.

tone and urgency excluded from decision by BND

final_answer: The source packet closes the execution boundary for invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match. The controlling control record confirms three-way match plus approver limit is current, exact, and tied to the action. Policy permits execution only when source records close the exact boundary, which is satisfied. The boundary note excludes urgency or email tone from decision factors.
